overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person driving from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The bus navigates through urban streets with active windshield wipers, stops at traffic lights, and turns at intersections while following other vehicles through wet road conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with bus stop shelter

agents.ego_description: driving slowly behind a silver sedan and white box truck in heavy rain with wipers active

notable_agents.action: white box truck moving slowly ahead with brake lights intermittently on
silver sedan directly ahead stopped or moving at low speed

entered.detail: large white delivery truck with cargo container blocking part of the road ahead
silver BMW sedan with illuminated brake lights directly in front of the bus
modern multi-story commercial buildings with large windows lining the right side of the street
covered bus stop shelter with glass panels on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus drives slowly through a rainy urban street, following a silver sedan and white truck. Commercial buildings line the right side while a bus stop shelter is visible on the left. Windshield wipers actively clear heavy rain from the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban arterial road with tree line

events.description: bus overtakes the silver sedan on the left side and pulls ahead
approaching intersection with traffic light visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: accelerating past the silver car and continuing down the wet road toward the intersection

entered.detail: row of green leafy trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates and overtakes the silver sedan, leaving it behind. The road opens up with trees lining the left side while the white truck remains visible ahead. The bus approaches a traffic light at the end of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with tram stop platform

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop at red traffic light behind a brown sedan
traffic light changes to green and vehicles ahead begin to move forward

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light behind other vehicles, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: brown sedan stopped directly ahead with brake lights illuminated
blue sports car waiting in the right lane adjacent to the bus

entered.detail: dark brown sedan stopped at the traffic light directly in front of the bus
bright blue Porsche sports car with headlights on in the right lane
overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green
elevated tram stop platform with shelter on the left side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a red traffic light behind a brown sedan, with a blue sports car visible in the lane to the right. The bus waits at the intersection near a tram stop platform for approximately 15 seconds until the light turns green.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban road with tram tracks and large residential building

events.description: bus executes a right turn at the intersection onto a new street
entering wider road with visible tram tracks running down the center

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and accelerating along the new road with tram tracks

entered.detail: metal tram tracks embedded in the road surface running down the center of the street
massive multi-story residential apartment complex with many windows visible in the distance
traffic signs and billboards including a blue circular sign on the right side

segments.scene_description: The bus turns right at the green light onto a wider street featuring prominent tram tracks down the center. A large apartment building looms ahead in the distance as the bus accelerates along the new route, leaving the intersection behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban environment, moving from a congested commercial street to a wider residential thoroughfare. It begins with the bus driving slowly through heavy rain, following a silver sedan and a white truck past commercial buildings and a bus stop shelter while windshield wipers actively clear the glass. As the bus accelerates to overtake the sedan, the scenery shifts to a more open road lined with trees before approaching a traffic light at the end of the street. The camera then comes to a halt behind a brown sedan at a red light near a tram stop platform, waiting alongside a blue sports car until the signal changes. Finally, the bus turns right onto a wider street with central tram tracks, accelerating toward a large apartment building looming in the distance.
